Document:
## The Null Sector
A vast territory of galactic space, notable for holding the home system of the Baseliners; Sol.
During the Corporate war, a paracausal weapon was deployed to completely annihilate a red planet in the Sol Sector. But, it didn't just stop there. The weapon had an ontological side effect, the complete erasure of the faction from present and future history. It created a wide area entropy-field in the form of a massive, growing rift in both spacetimes which tore asunder any ship that entered.
Recently, it has waned in strength, allowing (admittedly inconsistent) entrance.
The sector itself is notable because of its relatively untapped source of minerals, revitalizing a decaying industry that was mostly left with the lees of the Crepitum. But, more importantly (unlike most of Bluespace) the area in and around the Null Sector is clearer of the dirty bomb's influence, allowing short range FTL. This can be chained repeatedly (at the cost of immense power requirements) at relativistic speeds to practically blitz through realspace.
